title: Load Balancing
empty: No load balancers yet — create one to expose a logical model name.

form.settingsHint: Optional. Known key: circuit_breaker { consecutive_failures, cooldown_secs, error_rate? } — overrides the provider's breaker for this load balancer.

delete.routeConfirm: This deletes load balancer "{{name}}" with its members and aliases. Clients calling this logical model will fail.
delete.memberConfirm: Remove this member from the load balancer?
delete.aliasConfirm: Delete alias "{{name}}"? The exposed model name stops resolving.

members.title: Members
members.empty: No members — this load balancer resolves to nothing.
members.modelHint: The provider's model id. Suggestions come from the provider's registered models; any string is allowed.
members.tierHint: Lower = higher priority. Tier 0 is primary; higher tiers are failover.
members.weightHint: Within a tier, higher weight gets more traffic under the weighted strategy.
members.mixedProtocol: Members of one load balancer should share a protocol; mixing channels here is allowed but transforms differ per backend.

aliases.title: Aliases
aliases.empty: No aliases point to this load balancer.
aliases.aliasHint: An externally-visible model name that resolves to this load balancer. Must be globally unique.
aliases.duplicate: That alias name is already taken.
